# Balance Buddy

> Balance Buddy is an 8-week live online cohort that teaches finance professionals
> (Chartered Accountants, Cost & Management Accountants, Company Secretaries) to build
> AI assistants, automations and agent teams that handle repetitive finance, tax and
> compliance work. "AI Systems for Finance Professionals." Beginner-friendly, no code
> required. Instructor: Aditya Srivastava.

## About

- **What it is:** A live, weekend, cohort-based program (Saturday & Sunday, ~2 hours, online) over eight weeks.
- **Who it's for:** CA, CMA, CS and other finance/accounting professionals who want to use AI in real work.
- **What you build:** AI assistants, automations and multi-agent workflows for tasks like invoice extraction, GST reconciliation, audit sampling, variance commentary, TDS/return drafting, MIS dashboards and annual-report analysis.
- **Format:** Small focused group, live sessions, hands-on. Beginner friendly — no prior coding needed.
- **Risk-free:** First session is risk-free; full refund available before session 2.

## Instructor

- **Aditya Srivastava** — Data & Automation Specialist and instructor.

## Enrol / Contact

- Website: https://aditya.quest/
- Email: aditya@balancebuddy.com
- WhatsApp: +91 85281 00305
- Reserve a seat or book a free demo class via the form on the site.
